author: ngweihan_eth
content:
Hi all, I dropped a new writeup on historical state access patterns. Could be helpful if you're thinking about state optimization or ideas on improving state.
https://ethresear.ch/t/the-anatomy-of-ethereum-s-state-access/25317

author: hamanasu_ruka
content: I made a deterministic, replayable Lua I'm using to power a p2p version of TIC-80 and could theoretically be used with a blockchain. https://codeberg.org/agi-any-day-now/detlua

author: hamanasu_ruka
content: I think deterministic WASM is probably more interesting, but I wanted something with a good collection of games so I could prove out low latency optimistic execution
